query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE tenantId = 1) as contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenantId = 1) as accounts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals WHERE tenantId = 1) as deals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1) as tasks,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipelines WHERE tenantId = 1) as pipelines,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_stages WHERE tenantId = 1) as stages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_sources WHERE tenantId = 1) as sources,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE tenantId = 1) as campaigns,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loss_reasons WHERE tenantId = 1) as loss_reasons,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_catalog WHERE tenantId = 1) as products;
